steps.title: Identify what the graph shows
steps.content: The y-axis labeled Frequency represents how many containers have each number of walnuts. The x-axis shows the number of walnuts per container. To find the answer, we locate the bar for 78 walnuts and read its height on the frequency axis.

steps.title: Read the frequency for 78 walnuts
steps.content: The bar above 78 on the x-axis reaches a height of 7 on the frequency scale. This means 7 containers contain exactly 78 walnuts. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
